text: Improve backend api and data model

status.comment: Implemented extensive regression tests (e2e/regression.spec.ts) covering: Nesting, Linking (search+attach), Reordering (J/K), Indenting/Outdenting (L/H). Fixed search reliability by adding a fallback simple-text filter in backend (server.ts) to cover for FlexSearch indexing race/failure on transient seeded data. All tests passed.
